examples: At the last moment, Mollie, the foolish, pretty white mare who drew Mr. Jones's trap, came mincing daintily in, chewing at a lump of sugar.
Then we grind all the meat in the mincing machine.
The pepper was produced by Mincing Overseas Spice Company.
Tory peer Lord Tebbit - not known for mincing his words - was even more scathing.
But, not mincing his words, Mr Pearson Wright called for him to be sacked.
